task_completion.description: Log into the Drupal admin panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Drupal admin dashboard or toolbar is visible, indicating successful login using the provided admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the details page for Order #1
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the order details page for Order #1, displaying the customer name 'Mike Wilson' or username 'mikewilson'.

task_completion.description: Access the Payments interface for the order
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Payments' tab or section for Order #1 is open, showing the interface to add a new payment.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct payment amount and select the manual gateway
task_completion.visual_evidence: The add payment form is filled out with the amount '$1392.00' and the 'Manual' (or Check) payment gateway is selected.

task_completion.description: Save the payment and verify it is marked as completed
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is visible or the payment history list shows a recorded payment of $1392.00 with the state 'Completed'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web UI rather than terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show 'drush' commands or direct database queries being used to update the order status or insert payments.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Drupal website
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard web browser interface navigating the Drupal Commerce store, not a local HTML file or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open or used to alter the text of the order status or payment amount.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The payment must be recorded for Order #1 (customer username: mikewilson). The expected payment amount is exactly $1392.00. The payment must use the 'manual' (Manual / Check) payment gateway, and the final recorded payment state must be 'completed'.
